name: Pineapple Gelatin
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water in a small bowl and allow 5 minutes to soften.
2. Dissolve the softened gelatin over hot water.
3. Mix remaining ingredients in blender until smooth. Add gelatin mixture and whip until blended.
4. Pour into cup mold(s) and refrigerate until set.
5. Garnish with whipped topping.
